ddls:
CREATE TABLE "corpora" (
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corpus */,
  "corpus_name" TEXT /* Name of the corpus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corpus */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the corpus */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the corpus */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the corpus was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the corpus was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the corpus is distributed */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility level of the corpus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corpus the word belongs to */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Part-of-speech tag (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the word (e.g., frequency, importance) */,
  "page_rank" REAL /* Page rank of the word (e.g., relevance, importance) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the word was published or added to the corpus */,
  "lemma" TEXT /* Base form of the word */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the word */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of named entity */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or category the word is associated with */,
  "coherence_score" REAL /* Coherence score of the word within the corpus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_tag FOREIGN KEY ("tag") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the tag in the corpus */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example sentence or context where the tag is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the degree belongs to */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree value (e.g., frequency, importance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., frequency, importance, centrality) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_ranks" (
  "page_rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page rank */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the page rank belongs to */,
  "page_rank" REAL /* Page rank value (e.g., relevance, importance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the page rank */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to calculate the page rank */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the page rank is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_ranks_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the year belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the word was published or added to the corpus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "source_document" TEXT /* ID or reference to the source document where the word was published */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the corpus where the word was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corpus being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the corpus */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the corpus was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the corpus */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the corpus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query text */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was executed */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that generated the result */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word in the result */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the result (e.g., relevance, importance) */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* ID of the document where the word was found */,
  "snippet" TEXT /* Snippet of the text containing the word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corpus being versioned */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number or description */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
